message:
fix(storage,sync): optimize dirty-issue marking with INSERT OR REPLACE and fix intra-JSONL collision detection

Storage (sqlite.rs):
- Replace two-step DELETE + INSERT pattern for dirty issue marking with
  a single INSERT OR REPLACE, providing atomic updates that are more
  efficient and correctly handle existing dirty flags by updating their
  marked_at timestamp without requiring a separate delete pass
- Increase dirty issue insert chunk size from 400 to 450 for better
  batching throughput
- Batch blocked_issues_cache entries into a Vec before inserting, reducing
  per-row overhead in the cache rebuild path

Sync (mod.rs):
- Fix intra-JSONL collision detection during import: when a new issue is
  created from a JSONL line, immediately register its content hash and
  external_ref in the in-memory lookup maps so subsequent lines with
  identical content are correctly identified as duplicates even before
  the first entry is committed to the database
- Optimize compute_jsonl_hash to use byte-based I/O (read_until + trim_ascii)
  instead of String-based read_line, avoiding unnecessary UTF-8 validation
  overhead on large JSONL files

Tests:
- Minor dataset_registry test adjustments for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
